Interface IWorkspaceDomains3

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase

ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that allow you to alter a domain.

[Guid("7FD9B83C-76C0-4998-B9D3-AFE9600B5D36")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IWorkspaceDomains3 : IWorkspaceDomains2, IWorkspaceDomains
